title: aesandra butyracea
intro: Aesandra butyracea, also known as the Butyrospermum parkii or Shea tree, is a plant species native to Africa, valued for its rich and buttery seeds. The medicinal properties of Aesandra butyracea include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and moisturizing properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of using Aesandra butyracea include improving skin elasticity, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, and providing protection against UV damage. Aesandra butyracea is often used to prepare herbal creams, lotions, and butters, which can be applied topically to reap its benefits.
